Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(******************************************************************************************

 Equalities of exponentials of partial setoids

 Our goal is to prove that the category of partial setoids in a tripos is a topos, and for
 that we need to show that it has exponentials. We already constructed the object of the
 exponential and the evaluation and lambda abstraction morphisms. In this file, we finish
 the construction by verifying the necessary equalities. The two equalities that we need
 to verify are the following:
 - The beta-rule. The evaluation and lambda abstraction map need to satisfy the beta-rule,
   which can be expressed as the commutativity of a diagram.
 - The eta-rule. Lambda abstraction gives the unique morphism making some diagram commute.

 We start with some preliminary material. To prove the beta-rule and the eta-rule, we need to
 deal with statements that express the commutativity of some diagram, which says some morphism
 defined by [partial_setoid_exp_comm] is equal to some [φ]. Our first goal is to simplify such
 statements, so that proving and using them becomes more convenient.

 Content
 1. Basic material that is useful in the remainder of the file
 2. The beta-rule
 3. The eta-rule

 ******************************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.

with arguments constr at level 50, constr
and "_ [ _ ]tm" defined at level 10 with arguments
constr at next level, constr
have incompatible prefixes.
One of them will likely not work.

with arguments constr at level 50, constr
and "_ [ _ ]" defined at level 10 with arguments

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.Tripos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.GenericPredicate.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERs.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERMorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERBinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.ExponentialPER.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.ExponentialEval.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.ExponentialLam.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope hd.

Section HelpEquality.
  Context {H : tripos}
          {X Y Z : partial_setoid H}
          (φ : partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z) Y)
          (ψ : partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)).

  (** * 1. Basic material that is useful in the remainder of the file *)
  Definition partial_setoid_exp_comm
    : partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z) Y
    := partial_setoid_comp_morphism
         (pair_partial_setoid_morphism
            (partial_setoid_comp_morphism
               (partial_setoid_pr1 X Z)
               (id_partial_setoid_morphism X))
            (partial_setoid_comp_morphism
               (partial_setoid_pr2 X Z)
               ψ))
         (eval_partial_setoid X Y).

  Let ζ : partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z) Y
    := partial_setoid_exp_comm.

  Definition exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
    : form (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
    := let x := π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))) in
       let x' := π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))) in
       let y := π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))) in
       let z := π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))) in
       let f := π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))) in
       exp_partial_setoid_is_function [ f ]
       ∧
       ⟨ x , y ⟩ ∈ f.

  Definition exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
    : form ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)
    := let x := π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)))) in
       let x' := π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))) in
       let y := π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)))) in
       let z := π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)) in
       let z' := π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))) in
       let f := π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)))) in
       x' ~ x'
       ∧
       z' ~ z
       ∧
       ψ [ ⟨ z , f ⟩].

  Definition exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    : form ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
    := let x := π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) in
       let x' := π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))) in
       let x'' := π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))))) in
       let y := π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))) in
       let z := π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))))) in
       let f := π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))) in
       x'' ~ x
       ∧
       z ~ z
       ∧
       x ~ x'.

  Definition exp_comm_partial_setoid
    : form (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
    := ∃h ((∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3)
           ∧
           (∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2)
           ∧
           exp_comm_partial_setoid_1).

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
exp_comm_partial_setoid = ζ

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
exp_comm_partial_setoid = ζ

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ = exp_comm_partial_setoid

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
∃h (((∃h ((π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h X))) ~
           π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h X))
           ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h X))) ~
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h X))))
          [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X))),
           π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
          ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~
             π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
            [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)),
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]))
     [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))),
      π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))) ⟩]
     ∧ (∃h ((π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Z))) ~
             π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Z)))
             ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Z))) ~
               π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Z)))
            [⟨ π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((X ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))),
             π₂
               (tm_var (((X ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
             ⟩]
            ∧ ψ
              [⟨ π₂
                   (tm_var
                      (((X ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)),
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((X ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)))
               ⟩]))
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))),
        π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))
        ⟩])
    [⟨ π₁
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
     ⟩]
    ∧ (eval_partial_setoid_form X Y)
      [⟨ π₂
           (tm_var
              (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))
       ⟩]) = exp_comm_partial_setoid

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
∃h ((∃h ((π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                          ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))))) ~
          π₂
            (tm_var
               ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X))
          ∧ π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                            ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))))) ~
            π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                            ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))))))
         ∧ π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                 ×h X)) ~
           π₁
             (π₂
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))))
     ∧ ∃h ((π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                            ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))) ~
            π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                            ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)))))
            ∧ π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                              ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))) ~
              π₂
                (tm_var
                   ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)))
           ∧ ψ
             [⟨ π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)),
              π₂
                (π₂
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                           ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))
              ⟩]))
    ∧ (eval_partial_setoid_form X Y)
      [⟨ π₂
           (tm_var
              (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))
       ⟩]) = exp_comm_partial_setoid

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
∃h ((∃h ((π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                          ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))))) ~
          π₂
            (tm_var
               ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X))
          ∧ π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var

                            ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))))) ~

                            ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))))))
         ∧ π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                 ×h X)) ~
           π₁
             (π₂
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))))
     ∧ ∃h ((π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                            ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))) ~
            π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                            ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)))))
            ∧ π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                              ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))) ~
              π₂
                (tm_var
                   ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)))
           ∧ ψ
             [⟨ π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)),
              π₂
                (π₂
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                           ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))
              ⟩]))
    ∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function
       [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Y)))]
       ∧ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Y)) ⟩
         ∈ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Y))))
      [⟨ π₂
           (tm_var
              (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))
       ⟩]) = exp_comm_partial_setoid

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
∃h ((∃h ((π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                          ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))))) ~
          π₂
            (tm_var
               ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X))
          ∧ π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                            ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))))) ~

              (π₁

                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                            ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))))))
         ∧ π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                 ×h X)) ~
           π₁
             (π₂
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))))
     ∧ ∃h ((π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                            ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))) ~
            π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                            ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)))))
            ∧ π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                              ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))) ~
              π₂
                (tm_var
                   ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)))
           ∧ ψ
             [⟨ π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)),
              π₂
                (π₂
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                           ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))
              ⟩]))
    ∧ exp_partial_setoid_is_function
      [π₂
         (π₂
            (tm_var
               (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))]
      ∧ ⟨ π₁
            (π₂
               (tm_var
                  (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
        π₂
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))
        ⟩
        ∈ π₂
            (π₂
               (tm_var
                  (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))) =
exp_comm_partial_setoid

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
∃h (∃h (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))))) ~
        π₂
          (tm_var
             ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
              ×h X))
        ∧ π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                          ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))))) ~

                  ×h X)) ~
            π₁
              (π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                         ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))))
    ∧ ∃h (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                          ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))) ~
          π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                          ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)))))
          ∧ π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                            ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))) ~
            π₂
              (tm_var
                 ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                  ×h Z))
            ∧ ψ
              [⟨ π₂
                   (tm_var
                      ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)),
               π₂
                 (π₂
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                            ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))
               ⟩])
      ∧ exp_partial_setoid_is_function
        [π₂
           (π₂
              (tm_var
                 (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))]
        ∧ ⟨ π₁
              (π₂
                 (tm_var
                    (((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
          π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))
          ⟩
          ∈ π₂
              (π₂
                 (tm_var
                    (((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))) =
exp_comm_partial_setoid

    reflexivity.
  Qed.

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
t₁, t₂: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
t₃: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
f: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p₁: Δ ⊢ x ~ t₂
p₂: Δ ⊢ z ~ z
p₃: Δ ⊢ t₂ ~ t₁
p₄: Δ ⊢ z ~ t₃
p₅: Δ ⊢ ψ [⟨ t₃, f ⟩]
p₆: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₇: Δ ⊢ ⟨ t₁, y ⟩ ∈ f
Δ ⊢ exp_comm_partial_setoid

                     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))))))

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
t₁, t₂: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
t₃: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
f: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p₁: Δ ⊢ x ~ t₂
p₂: Δ ⊢ z ~ z
p₃: Δ ⊢ t₂ ~ t₁
p₄: Δ ⊢ z ~ t₃
p₅: Δ ⊢ ψ [⟨ t₃, f ⟩]
p₆: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₇: Δ ⊢ ⟨ t₁, y ⟩ ∈ f
Δ
⊢ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ~ t₂
  ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ∧ t₂ ~ t₁

p₇: Δ ⊢ ⟨ t₁, y ⟩ ∈ f
Δ ⊢ x ~ t₂ ∧ z ~ z ∧ t₂ ~ t₁

p₂: Δ ⊢ z ~ z

p₇: Δ ⊢ ⟨ t₁, y ⟩ ∈ f
Δ ⊢ t₂ ~ t₁
 exact p₃.

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
t₁, t₂: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
t₃: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
f: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p₁: Δ ⊢ x ~ t₂
p₂: Δ ⊢ z ~ z
p₃: Δ ⊢ t₂ ~ t₁
p₄: Δ ⊢ z ~ t₃
p₅: Δ ⊢ ψ [⟨ t₃, f ⟩]
p₆: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₇: Δ ⊢ ⟨ t₁, y ⟩ ∈ f
Δ
⊢ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ~
  π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)))
  ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ~ t₃
    ∧ ψ [⟨ t₃, f ⟩]

p₇: Δ ⊢ ⟨ t₁, y ⟩ ∈ f
Δ ⊢ x ~ x ∧ z ~ t₃ ∧ ψ [⟨ t₃, f ⟩]

p₅: Δ ⊢ ψ [⟨ t₃, f ⟩]
p₆: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₇: Δ ⊢ ⟨ t₁, y ⟩ ∈ f
Δ ⊢ z ~ t₃
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
t₁, t₂: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
t₃: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
f: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p₁: Δ ⊢ x ~ t₂
p₂: Δ ⊢ z ~ z
p₃: Δ ⊢ t₂ ~ t₁
p₄: Δ ⊢ z ~ t₃
p₅: Δ ⊢ ψ [⟨ t₃, f ⟩]
p₆: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₇: Δ ⊢ ⟨ t₁, y ⟩ ∈ f
Δ ⊢ ψ [⟨ t₃, f ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
t₁, t₂: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
t₃: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
f: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p₁: Δ ⊢ x ~ t₂
p₂: Δ ⊢ z ~ z
p₃: Δ ⊢ t₂ ~ t₁
p₄: Δ ⊢ z ~ t₃
p₅: Δ ⊢ ψ [⟨ t₃, f ⟩]
p₆: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₇: Δ ⊢ ⟨ t₁, y ⟩ ∈ f
Δ ⊢ x ~ x
 exact (partial_setoid_refl_l p₁).

Δ
⊢ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y), ⟨ t₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
t₁, t₂: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
t₃: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
f: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p₁: Δ ⊢ x ~ t₂
p₂: Δ ⊢ z ~ z
p₃: Δ ⊢ t₂ ~ t₁
p₄: Δ ⊢ z ~ t₃
p₅: Δ ⊢ ψ [⟨ t₃, f ⟩]
p₆: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₇: Δ ⊢ ⟨ t₁, y ⟩ ∈ f
Δ
⊢ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function
   [π₂
      (π₂
         (tm_var (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))]
   ∧ ⟨ π₁
         (π₂
            (tm_var
               (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))
     ⟩
     ∈ π₂
         (π₂
            (tm_var
               (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))))
  [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y), ⟨ t₁, f ⟩ ⟩]

  Y

t₃: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z

p₁: Δ ⊢ x ~ t₂

p₇: Δ ⊢ ⟨ t₁, y ⟩ ∈ f
Δ
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
  ∧ ⟨ t₁, π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩ ∈ f

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
t₁, t₂: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
t₃: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
f: tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p₁: Δ ⊢ x ~ t₂
p₂: Δ ⊢ z ~ z
p₃: Δ ⊢ t₂ ~ t₁
p₄: Δ ⊢ z ~ t₃
p₅: Δ ⊢ ψ [⟨ t₃, f ⟩]
p₆: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₇: Δ ⊢ ⟨ t₁, y ⟩ ∈ f
Δ ⊢ ⟨ t₁, y ⟩ ∈ f
 exact p₇.
  Qed.

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
χ: form ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
Γ:= ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ X
x₂:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ X
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ Y
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ Z
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]
⊢ χ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩]
exp_comm_partial_setoid ⊢ χ

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
χ: form ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
Γ:= ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ X
x₂:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ X
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ Y
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ Z
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]
⊢ χ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩]
exp_comm_partial_setoid ⊢ χ

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
χ: form ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
Γ:= ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ X
x₂:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ X
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ Y
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ Z
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]
⊢ χ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩]
∃h (∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    ∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1) ⊢ χ

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
χ: form ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
Γ:= ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ X

x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ X

z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ Z
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]
⊢ χ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩]
(∃h (∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
     ∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
       ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1))
[π₁
   (tm_var
      ((prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  ∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
⊢ χ
  [π₁
     (tm_var
        ((prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
         ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]

⊢ χ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩]
∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1

                ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂
        (tm_var
           (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
            ×h X)) ⟩])
 ∧ ∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
       [⟨ (π₁
             (tm_var
                ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                 ×h X)))
          [π₁
             (tm_var

                  ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm,
        π₂
          (tm_var
             (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
               ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩])
   ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
     [π₁
        (tm_var
           ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
⊢ χ
  [(π₁
      (tm_var
         ((prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
          ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))
   [π₁
      (tm_var
         ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))
   ]tm]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
χ: form ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
Γ:= ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ X
x₂:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ X
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ Y
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ Z
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]
⊢ χ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩]
Δ:= ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1: form (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
              ×h X)))
       [π₁
          (tm_var
             (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
               ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂
       (tm_var
          (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
           ×h X)) ⟩])
∧ (∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
       [⟨ (π₁
             (tm_var
                ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                 ×h X)))
          [π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                  ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm,
        π₂
          (tm_var
             (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
               ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩])
   ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
     [π₁
        (tm_var
           ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
⊢ χ
  [(π₁
      (tm_var
         ((prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
          ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))
   [π₁
      (tm_var
         ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))
   ]tm]

          ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))
    ]tm)
   [π₁
      (tm_var
         (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
          ×h Z)) ]tm]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
χ: form ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
Γ:= ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ X
x₂:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ X
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ Y
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ Z
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]
⊢ χ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩]
Δ:= ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1: form (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
(exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
 [(π₁
     (tm_var
        ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))
  [π₁
     (tm_var
        (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
         ×h Z)) ]tm]
 ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
   [π₁
      (tm_var
         (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
          ×h Z))])
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
  [⟨ (π₁
        (tm_var
           ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))
     [π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
            ×h Z)) ]tm,
   π₂
     (tm_var
        (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
         ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ χ
  [((π₁
       (tm_var
          ((prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
           ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))
    [π₁
       (tm_var
          ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))
    ]tm)
   [π₁
      (tm_var
         (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
          ×h Z)) ]tm]

Δ:= ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1: form (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
(exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
 [π₁

       (tm_var
          (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
           ×h Z)))]

               ×h X) ×h Z))),
   π₂
     (tm_var
        (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
         ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ χ
  [π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Z))))]

  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1: form (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
χ: form ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
Γ:= ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ X
x₂:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ X
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ Y
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ Z
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]
⊢ χ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩]
Δ:= ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1: form (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
(exp_comm_partial_setoid_1 [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))]
 ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3 [π₁ (tm_var Γ)])
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)), π₂ (tm_var Γ) ⟩]
⊢ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
χ: form ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
Γ:= ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ X

x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ X

z₂:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ Z

p: exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]
⊢ χ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩]
Δ:= ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1: form (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
exp_comm_partial_setoid_1 [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3 [π₁ (tm_var Γ)]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)), π₂ (tm_var Γ) ⟩]
⊢ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]

  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)), π₂ (tm_var Γ) ⟩]
⊢ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))) ⟩,
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))) ⟩,
   ⟨ π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))),
   π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))) ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))),
           π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))) ⟩,
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))) ⟩,
       ⟨ π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))),
       π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))) ⟩ ⟩,
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)) ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))),
             π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))) ⟩,
           π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))) ⟩,
         ⟨ π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))),
         π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))) ⟩ ⟩,
       π₂ (tm_var Γ) ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
χ: form ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
Γ:= ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ X
x₂:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ X
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ Y
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ Z
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]
⊢ χ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩]
Δ:= ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1: form (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
exp_comm_partial_setoid_1 [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3 [π₁ (tm_var Γ)]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)), π₂ (tm_var Γ) ⟩]
⊢ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1 [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3 [π₁ (tm_var Γ)]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)), π₂ (tm_var Γ) ⟩]

      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
χ: form ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
Γ:= ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ X
x₂:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ X
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ Y
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ Z
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]
⊢ χ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩]
Δ:= ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1: form (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
χ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩]
⊢ χ
  [π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Z))))]
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
χ: form ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
Γ:= ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ X
x₂:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ X
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ Y
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ Z
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]
⊢ χ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩]
Δ:= ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1: form (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
χ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩] ⊢ χ [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
χ: form ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
Γ:= ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ X
x₂:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ X
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ X

z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ Z
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]
⊢ χ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩]
Δ:= ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1: form (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
χ
[⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))),
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))) ⟩,
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))) ⟩]
⊢ χ [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
χ: form ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
Γ:= ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ X
x₂:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ X
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ Y
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ Z
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]
⊢ χ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩]
Δ:= ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1: form (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
χ [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))]
⊢ χ [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))]

      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ [δ]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
Δ ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid [γ] ⊢ χ

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ [δ]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
Δ ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid [γ] ⊢ χ

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ [δ]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
Δ
∧ (∃h (∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
       ∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
         ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1)) [γ] ⊢ χ

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ [δ]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
Δ
∧ ∃h ((∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
       ∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
         ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1)
      [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩]) ⊢ χ

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ [δ]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
Δ
∧ ∃h ((∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
       ∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
         ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1)
      [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ?Goal0
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ [δ]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
(Δ
 ∧ ∃h ((∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
        ∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
          ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1)
       [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h ?Goal))] ∧ ?Goal0
⊢ χ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h ?Goal))]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ [δ]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
Δ
∧ ∃h ((∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
       ∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
         ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1)
      [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ?Goal0

  Y

     ∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2

      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2

(Δ

        ∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
          ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1)
       [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,

[π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
∧ (∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
   ∧ ∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
     ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1)
  [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,

    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
(((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))])
  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))]
  ∧ (∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
         [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
              ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
            ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩]))
    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))]
    ∧ (∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
           [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
                ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
              [π₁
                 (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
            ⟩]))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))]
      ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
         [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
 ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
   [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩])
[π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h ?Goal))]
∧ ?Goal0
⊢ ((χ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))])
   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
  [π₁
     (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h ?Goal))]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ [δ]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))])
 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))]
 ∧ (∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
        [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩]))
   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))]
   ∧ (∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
          [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
               ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
             ⟩
             [π₁
                (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
             ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)) ⟩]))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))]
     ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
        [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ?Goal0

  ∧ (∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3

 ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
   [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,

  Y

  Y

γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)

  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
((((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))])
   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
  ∧ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3

               ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
             ⟩

    [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
    ∧ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
            [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
               [π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
             ⟩]))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
      [π₁
         (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
      ∧ ((exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
          [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])
         [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
        [π₁
           (tm_var
              (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))])
 ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩])
   [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))])
∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
   [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)) ⟩])
  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))
     ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ ((χ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))])
   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ [δ]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
((((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))])
   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
  ∧ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
          [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
               ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
             ⟩
             [π₁
                (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))
             ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩]))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
    [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
    ∧ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
            [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
               [π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
             ⟩]))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
      [π₁
         (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
      ∧ ((exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
          [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])
         [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
        [π₁
           (tm_var
              (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))])
 ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩])
   [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))])
∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
   [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)) ⟩])
  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))
     ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ Δ [δ]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
    [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
      ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
        [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩]
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ [δ]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
χ [δ]
⊢ ((χ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))])
   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]

  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

  Y

    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2

   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
  ∧ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
          [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
               ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
             ⟩
             [π₁
                (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))
             ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩]))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
    [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
    ∧ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
            [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
               [π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
             ⟩]))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
      [π₁
         (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
      ∧ ((exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
          [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])
         [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
        [π₁
           (tm_var
              (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))])
 ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩

   [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))])
∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
   [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,

  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))
     ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]

      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
      ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2

H: tripos

φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

  Y

Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H

x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X

δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' (ℙ (X ×h Y))

∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
((((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))])
   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]

             ]tm,

            [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
               [π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
             ⟩]))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])

         (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]

        [π₁

 ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,

   [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))])
∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
   [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩

    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)) ⟩])

     ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ Δ [δ]

                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩

             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
             ⟩]))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
      [π₁
         (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]

        [π₁

    [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩])
   [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))])
∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
   [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)) ⟩])
  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))
     ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1 [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ [δ]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
((((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))])
   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
  ∧ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
          [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
               ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
             ⟩
             [π₁
                (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))
             ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩]))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
    [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
    ∧ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
            [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
               [π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
             ⟩]))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
      [π₁
         (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
      ∧ ((exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
          [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])
         [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
        [π₁
           (tm_var
              (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))])
 ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩])
   [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))])
∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
   [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)) ⟩])
  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))
     ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]

                 ]tm,

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H

  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

  Y

x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X

  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
((((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))])
   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
  ∧ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
          [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
               ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
             ⟩

             ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩]))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
    [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
    ∧ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
            [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩

                  (tm_var
                     ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
             ⟩]))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
      [π₁
         (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
      ∧ ((exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
          [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])
         [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
        [π₁
           (tm_var
              (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))])
 ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩])
   [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))])
∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
   [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩

     ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ Δ [δ]

  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

  Y

γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H

x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X

  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))])
 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
⊢ Δ [δ]

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H

  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

  Y

    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
Δ
[π₁
   (π₁
      (π₁
         (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))]
⊢ Δ [δ]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩])
   [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))])
∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
   [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)) ⟩])
  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))
     ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1 [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ [δ]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))])
 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
∧ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
        [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩]))
   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
  ∧ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
          [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
               ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
             ⟩
             [π₁
                (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
             ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)) ⟩]))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
    [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
    ∧ ((exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
        [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
      [π₁
         (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
⊢ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1 [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]

        
H: tripos

 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])

[⟨ γ
   [π₁
      (π₁

   ]tm,
 π₂

 ⟩]
⊢ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1 [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]

x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X

    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2

   [π₁

   ]tm,
 π₂

 ⟩]

  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm,

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H

  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ

∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ γ
   [π₁
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))
   ]tm,
 π₂
   (π₁
      (π₁
         (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))
 ⟩]
⊢ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))) ⟩]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ [δ]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
((((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))])
   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
  ∧ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
          [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
               ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
             ⟩
             [π₁
                (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))
             ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩]))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
    [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
    ∧ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
            [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
               [π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
             ⟩]))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
      [π₁
         (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
      ∧ ((exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
          [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])
         [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
        [π₁
           (tm_var
              (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))])
 ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩])
   [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))])
∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
   [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)) ⟩])
  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))
     ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H

x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
