f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ [δ]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
(((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))])
  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
 [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
 ∧ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
         [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
              ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
            ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩]))
    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
   [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
   ∧ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
           [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
                ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
              [π₁
                 (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
            ⟩]))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
     [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
     ∧ ((exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
         [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])
        [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
       [π₁
          (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))])
∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
   [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
⊢ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ [δ]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
(exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
 [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ]tm,
  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩])
[π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
⊢ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ [δ]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
(exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
 [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ]tm,
  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩])
[π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
⊢ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm,
     ⟨ π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))),
     π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))) ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]

φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

  Y

γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ

∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
(exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
 [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ]tm,
  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩])
[π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
⊢ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))) ⟩, x₂ ⟩]

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ [δ]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
[⟨ ⟨ γ
     [π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))
     ]tm,
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))
   ⟩,
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))
 ⟩]
⊢ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))) ⟩, x₂ ⟩]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ [δ]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
((((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))])
   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
  ∧ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
          [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
               ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
             ⟩
             [π₁
                (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))
             ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩]))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
    [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
    ∧ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
            [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
               [π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
             ⟩]))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
      [π₁
         (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]
      ∧ ((exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
          [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])
         [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
        [π₁
           (tm_var
              (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))])
 ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩])
   [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))])
∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
   [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)) ⟩])
  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))
     ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
  [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩]

  Y

  Y

∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
(exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
 [⟨ ⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)) ]tm,
  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)) ⟩])
[⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))
   ]tm,
 π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]

  [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩]

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ

∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
χ [δ]
⊢ ((χ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))])
   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))]

  Y

  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ, χ: form Γ
γ: tm Γ (prod_partial_setoid X Z ×h Y)
Γ':= ((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' X
z:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Z
δ:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' Γ
f:= π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' (ℙ (X ×h Y))
p: Δ [δ]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, x₂ ⟩]
    ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
      [⟨ ⟨ γ [δ ]tm, ⟨ x₁, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩] ⊢ χ [δ]
χ [δ]
⊢ χ
  [π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((Γ ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))]

      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.
End HelpEquality.

Section LamEqs.
  Context {H : tripos}
          {X Y Z : partial_setoid H}
          (φ : partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z) Y).

  (** * 2. The beta-rule *)
  Let ζ : partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z) Y
    := partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ).

  Definition lam_partial_setoid_comm_form
             (x := π₁ (π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h (X ×h Z) ×h Y)))))
             (y := π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h (X ×h Z) ×h Y))))
             (z := π₂ (π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h (X ×h Z) ×h Y)))))
    : tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
    := {{ lam_image_form φ }} [ ⟨ !! , π₂ (π₁ (tm_var _)) ⟩ ]tm.

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function
  [lam_partial_setoid_comm_form]

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function
  [lam_partial_setoid_comm_form]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function
  [{{lam_image_form φ}}
   [⟨ !!, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩ ]tm]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ
⊢ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)))
  [⟨ !!, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
(exp_partial_setoid_is_function [{{lam_image_form φ}}])
[⟨ !!, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function
  [{{lam_image_form φ}}
   [⟨ !!, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩ ]tm]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ
⊢ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)))
  [⟨ !!, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ
⊢ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)))
  [⟨ !!, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩ ]tm ~
  (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)))
  [⟨ !!, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩ ]tm

  Y

  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)))

  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
φ
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)))

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Y

  Y

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z

  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)))

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
φ ⊢ z ~ z

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
φ ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
⟨ x, z ⟩ ~ ⟨ x, z ⟩ ⊢ z ~ z

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)

φ
⊢ φ
  [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩,
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]

  Y

  Y
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X

z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
φ ⊢ φ [tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)]

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X

z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
φ ⊢ φ

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

⟨ x, z ⟩ ~ ⟨ x, z ⟩ ⊢ z ~ z

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H

  Y

  Y
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X

z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
π₂ ⟨ x, z ⟩ ~ π₂ ⟨ x, z ⟩ ⊢ z ~ z

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
z ~ z ⊢ z ~ z

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
(exp_partial_setoid_is_function [{{lam_image_form φ}}])
[⟨ !!, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function
  [{{lam_image_form φ}}
   [⟨ !!, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩ ]tm]

  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
exp_partial_setoid_is_function
[{{lam_image_form φ}}
 [⟨ !!, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function
  [{{lam_image_form φ}}
   [⟨ !!, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩ ]tm]

      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
φ
⊢ (lam_partial_setoid_eq φ)
  [⟨ z, lam_partial_setoid_comm_form ⟩]

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
φ
⊢ (lam_partial_setoid_eq φ)
  [⟨ z, lam_partial_setoid_comm_form ⟩]

  [⟨ z,
   {{lam_image_form φ}}
   [⟨ !!, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]

((lam_partial_setoid_eq φ)
 [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)), {{lam_image_form φ}} ⟩])
[⟨ !!, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
φ ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
⟨ x, z ⟩ ~ ⟨ x, z ⟩ ⊢ z ~ z

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
z ~ z ⊢ z ~ z

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
((lam_partial_setoid_eq φ)
 [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)), {{lam_image_form φ}} ⟩])
[⟨ !!, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ (lam_partial_setoid_eq φ)
  [⟨ z,
   {{lam_image_form φ}}
   [⟨ !!, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
(lam_partial_setoid_eq φ)
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
 {{lam_image_form φ}}
 [⟨ !!, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
⊢ (lam_partial_setoid_eq φ)
  [⟨ z,
   {{lam_image_form φ}}
   [⟨ !!, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]

      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ = ζ

π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ~

φ ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
p₁: φ ⊢ x ~ x
⟨ x, z ⟩ ~ ⟨ x, z ⟩ ⊢ z ~ z

x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X

z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
p₁: φ ⊢ x ~ x
p₂: φ ⊢ z ~ z
φ ⊢ z ~ z

        exact p₂.
      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z
p₁: φ ⊢ x ~ x
p₂: φ ⊢ z ~ z
φ
⊢ (lam_partial_setoid φ)
  [⟨ z, lam_partial_setoid_comm_form ⟩]

φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

  Y

   π₁ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y))

     [π₂ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y))])
  [⟨ z, lam_partial_setoid_comm_form ⟩]

φ
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)) ~

  [⟨ z, lam_partial_setoid_comm_form ⟩]
  ∧ exp_partial_setoid_is_function
    [(π₂ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)))

  Y

  ∈ {{lam_image_form φ}}
    [⟨ !!, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩ ]tm

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H

⊢ φ
  [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩,
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]

  Y

p₁: φ ⊢ x ~ x
p₂: φ ⊢ z ~ z
φ ⊢ φ

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)

ζ ⊢ φ
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ) ⊢ φ

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
exp_comm_partial_setoid (lam_partial_setoid φ) ⊢ φ

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                           ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                         ×h Z)))))),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                         ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                       ×h Z)))))) ⟩,
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                   ×h X) ×h Z))))) ⟩,
 ⟨ π₁
     (π₂
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                   ×h X) ×h Z))))),
 π₂
   (π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                 ×h X) ×h Z))))) ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            ((((... ×h Y)
                               ×h X ×h ℙ ...) ×h X)
                             ×h Z)))))),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((... ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ ...)
                            ×h X) ×h Z)))))) ⟩,
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))
       ⟩,
     ⟨ π₁
         (π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))),
     π₂
       (π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                      ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))
     ⟩ ⟩,
   π₂
     (π₁

Γ:= ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) X

  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm

  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) X

                ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) Y
z₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) Z

  (tm_var
     (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Z)): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) Z
f:= π₂
  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                           ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                         ×h Z)))))),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                         ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                       ×h Z)))))) ⟩,
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                   ×h X) ×h Z))))) ⟩,
 ⟨ π₁
     (π₂
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                   ×h X) ×h Z))))),
 π₂
   (π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                 ×h X) ×h Z))))) ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            ((((... ×h Y)
                               ×h X ×h ℙ ...) ×h X)
                             ×h Z)))))),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((... ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ ...)
                            ×h X) ×h Z)))))) ⟩,
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))
       ⟩,
     ⟨ π₁
         (π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))),
     π₂
       (π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                      ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))
     ⟩ ⟩,
   π₂
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
            ×h Z))) ⟩]
  ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2 (lam_partial_setoid φ))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              ((((... ×h Y)
                                 ×h X ×h ℙ ...) ×h X)
                               ×h Z)))))),
           π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            ((((... ×h Y)
                               ×h X ×h ℙ ...) ×h X)
                             ×h Z)))))) ⟩,
         π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                          ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                        ×h Z))))) ⟩,
       ⟨ π₁
           (π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                          ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                        ×h Z))))),
       π₂
         (π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))
       ⟩ ⟩,
     π₂
       (tm_var
          (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
           ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ ⟨ π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                           ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                         ×h Z)))))),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                         ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                       ×h Z)))))) ⟩,
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                   ×h X) ×h Z))))) ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ:= ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₁
  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) X
x₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
          ×h X) ×h Z))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) X
y:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) Y
z₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂
  (tm_var
     (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Z)): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) Z
f:= π₂
  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
  ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2 (lam_partial_setoid φ))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩]

exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ:= ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₁
  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) X
x₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
          ×h X) ×h Z))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) X
y:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) Y
z₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm

                ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm

   ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]

  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z)
p₁: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩]

[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

  (π₁

              (tm_var
                 (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂
  (tm_var
     (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Z)): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) Z
f:= π₂
  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
  ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
       (lam_partial_setoid φ))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]: form
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z)
p₁: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f
x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂ ⊢ ?y ~ x₂

[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]

  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)

                ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm

   ×h Z) Y

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁

              (tm_var
                 (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm

   ×h Z) Z

  (tm_var
     (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)

[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]

  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
  ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
       (lam_partial_setoid φ))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]: form
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z)
p₁: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f
p₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

  Y

x₁:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm

[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3

p₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

  (π₁
     (π₁

                ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm

   ×h Z) Y
z₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm

  (tm_var
     (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)

   ×h Z) Z

  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var

[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]

   ×h Z)
p₁: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f
p₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
(exp_partial_setoid_is_function
 [π₂
    (π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))]
 ∧ ⟨ π₁
       (π₂
          (tm_var (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
   π₂
     (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))
   ⟩
   ∈ π₂
       (π₂
          (tm_var (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))))
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) X
x₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
          ×h X) ×h Z))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) X

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) Y

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)

  (π₂
     (π₁

           (tm_var

                ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
  ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2

    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]: form
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z)

p₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

   ×h Z) Z

  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))

   ×h Z)

p₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
p₃: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]

tm (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
  X
 exact x₂.

               ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h Z))))))
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]
∧ (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                  ×h Z))))) ~
   π₂
     (tm_var
        ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)))

  ∧ ((lam_partial_setoid φ)
     [⟨ π₂
          (tm_var
             ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
              ×h Z)),
      π₂
        (π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                  ×h Z)))) ⟩])
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₂ ⟩, y ⟩] ⇔ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f

              (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) Y
z₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂
  (tm_var
     (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Z)): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) Z
f:= π₂
  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
  ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
       (lam_partial_setoid φ))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]: form
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z)
p₁: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f
p₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
p₃: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₄: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f
p₅: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₂ ⟩, y ⟩] ⇔ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f
p₆: Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
p₇: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₂ ⟩, y ⟩]
Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁

          exact (partial_setoid_refl_l p₂).

   ×h Z) Z
f:= π₂
  (π₂
     (π₁

                ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm

   ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))

[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
  ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
       (lam_partial_setoid φ))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]: form
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z)

p₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

p₄: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f
p₅: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₂ ⟩, y ⟩] ⇔ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f
p₆: Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
p₇: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₂ ⟩, y ⟩]
Δ ⊢ π₂ ⟨ x₁, z₂ ⟩ ~ π₂ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩

  Y

  Y

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁

                 (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm

                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm

   ×h Z) Z

  (tm_var
     (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Z)): tm

   ×h Z) Z

  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
[⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
  ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2
       (lam_partial_setoid φ))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]: form
  (((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Z)
p₁: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f
p₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
p₃: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₄: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f
p₅: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₂ ⟩, y ⟩] ⇔ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f
p₆: Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
p₇: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₂ ⟩, y ⟩]
Δ ⊢ y ~ y
 exact (exp_partial_setoid_cod_defined _ _ p₃ p₁).
  Qed.

  (** * 3. The eta-rule *)
  Context (φ' : partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)).

  Let ζ' : partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z) Y
    := partial_setoid_exp_comm φ'.

  Context (p : φ = ζ').

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
φ' ⊢ lam_partial_setoid φ

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
φ' ⊢ lam_partial_setoid φ

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
φ' ⊢ lam_partial_setoid ζ'

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
φ' ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form ζ'

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
z:= π₁ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)): tm (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y) Z
φ' ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form ζ'

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
z:= π₁ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)): tm (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y) Z
f:= π₂ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)): tm (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
φ' ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form ζ'

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
z:= π₁ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)): tm (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y) Z
f:= π₂ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)): tm (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
φ'
⊢ (lam_partial_setoid_form ζ')
  [tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

  Y
p: φ = ζ'

  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

⊢ (lam_partial_setoid_form ζ')
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)),
   π₂ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)) ⟩]

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

  Y
p: φ = ζ'
z:= π₁ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)): tm (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y) Z
f:= π₂ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)): tm (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
φ'
⊢ (∀h (∀h (ζ'
           [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
              π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                          ×h Y)))) ⟩,
            π₂
              (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ⟩]
           ⇔ ⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂
               (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩
             ∈ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                           ×h Y))))))) [⟨ z, f ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

  Y

f:= π₂ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)): tm (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
φ'
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((ζ'
           [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
              π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                          ×h Y)))) ⟩,
            π₂
              (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ⟩]
           ⇔ ⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂
               (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩
             ∈ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                           ×h Y)))))
          [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ z, f ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩
             [π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
           ⟩]))

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
z:= π₁ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)): tm (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y) Z
f:= π₂ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)): tm (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
(φ' [π₁ (tm_var ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))]
⊢ (ζ'
   [⟨ ⟨ π₂
          (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))
      ⟩, π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ⇔ ⟨ π₂
         (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
     ∈ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ z, f ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))
       ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

⊢ (exp_comm_partial_setoid φ') [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]
  ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H

  Y

f:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ⊢ z ~ z
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)

q₁: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ⊢ z ~ z
φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩]
⊢ (exp_comm_partial_setoid φ') [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]
  ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

q₂: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f ⊢ ⟨ x, ?y ⟩ ∈ f

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₁
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
f:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
q₁: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ⊢ z ~ z
q₂: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
q₃: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f ⊢ x ~ x
φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩]
⊢ (exp_comm_partial_setoid φ') [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]
  ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₁
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
f:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) (ℙ (X ×h Y))

q₂: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
q₃: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f ⊢ x ~ x
(φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩])
[π₁
   (π₁
      (π₁
         (tm_var
            ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
               ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩
     [π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))
     ]tm,
   ⟨ π₁
       (π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   ((((((Z ×h ...) ×h X) ×h Y)
                      ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))),
   π₂
     (π₂
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((((Z ×h ...) ×h X) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))
   ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩
         [π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((((Z ×h ...) ×h X) ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))
         ]tm,
       ⟨ π₁
           (π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((((... ×h X) ×h Y)
                          ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                        ×h Z))))),
       π₂
         (π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((... ×h X) ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))
       ⟩ ⟩,
     π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))) ⟩]
    ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2 φ')
      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩
           [π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((((Z ×h ...) ×h X) ×h Y)
                          ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                        ×h Z)))) ]tm,
         ⟨ π₁
             (π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((((... ×h X) ×h Y)
                            ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                          ×h Z))))),
         π₂
           (π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((((... ×h X) ×h Y)
                          ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                        ×h Z))))) ⟩ ⟩,
       π₂
         (tm_var
            ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
               ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ (⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f)
  [π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))]

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

  Y
p: φ = ζ'
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) Y

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
f:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
q₁: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ⊢ z ~ z
q₂: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
q₃: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f ⊢ x ~ x
(φ'
 [⟨ π₁
      (π₁
         (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
  π₂
    (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))
  ⟩])
[π₁
   (π₁
      (π₁
         (tm_var
            ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
               ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))
       ⟩, π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
     ⟩
     [π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))
     ]tm,
   ⟨ π₁
       (π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   ((((((Z ×h ...) ×h X) ×h Y)
                      ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))),
   π₂
     (π₂
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((((Z ×h ...) ×h X) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))
   ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))
           ⟩,
         π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((((Z ×h ...) ×h X) ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))
         ]tm,
       ⟨ π₁
           (π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((((... ×h X) ×h Y)
                          ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                        ×h Z))))),
       π₂
         (π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((... ×h X) ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))
       ⟩ ⟩,
     π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))) ⟩]
    ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2 φ')
      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))
             ⟩,
           π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
           ⟩
           [π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((((Z ×h ...) ×h X) ×h Y)
                          ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                        ×h Z)))) ]tm,
         ⟨ π₁
             (π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((((... ×h X) ×h Y)
                            ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                          ×h Z))))),
         π₂
           (π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((((... ×h X) ×h Y)
                          ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                        ×h Z))))) ⟩ ⟩,
       π₂
         (tm_var
            ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
               ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
   ∈ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
  [π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))]

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
Γ':= (((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' X
φ'
[⟨ π₁
     (π₁

  ⟩

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

  Y

  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

  Y

  (π₁

x₃:= π₂

y:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Y
z₁:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Z))))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂
  (tm_var
     ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)): tm

     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Z
f₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Z))))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
f₂:= π₂
  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
φ' [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
    ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2 φ')
      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f₁

∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function
   [π₂
      (π₂
         (tm_var (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))]
   ∧ ⟨ π₁
         (π₂
            (tm_var

           (tm_var
              ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
               ×h X)) ~
         π₁
           (π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                      ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
    ∧ (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))) ~
       π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)))))
       ∧ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                         ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))) ~
         π₂
           (tm_var
              ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
               ×h Z))
         ∧ φ'
           [⟨ π₂
                (tm_var
                   ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)),
            π₂
              (π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                         ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))
            ⟩])
      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f₁

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₁
  (π₂
     (π₁

           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm

     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) X
x₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
           ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) X
y:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Y
z₁:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Z))))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂
  (tm_var
     ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Z
f₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Z))))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
f₂:= π₂
  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
φ' [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function
   [(π₂
       (π₂
          (tm_var (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
     [⟨ ⟨ π₁
            (π₂
               (tm_var
                  (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
        π₂
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))
        ⟩,
      π₂
        (π₂
           (tm_var
              (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩ ]tm])
  ∧ ((π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                      ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))))) ~
      π₂
        (tm_var
           ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩]
     ∧ (π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))))) ~
        π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))))))

       ∧ (π₂
            (tm_var
               ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X)) ~
          π₁
            (π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))))
         [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩])
    ∧ (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))) ~
       π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))))
      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]
      ∧ (π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                         ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))) ~
         π₂
           (tm_var
              ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
               ×h Z)))
        [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩]
        ∧ φ'
          [⟨ π₂
               (tm_var
                  ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                   ×h Z)),
           π₂
             (π₂
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)))) ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩
           ]tm] ⊢ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f₁

  Y

  Y

  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

  Y

x₁:= π₂
  (π₁

              (tm_var
                 ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm

     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) X

        ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)

  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)

  (π₁

        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)

  (π₁

                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)

  (tm_var

     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))

∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function
   [(π₂
       (π₂
          (tm_var (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
     [⟨ ⟨ π₁
            (π₂
               (tm_var
                  (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
        π₂
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))

      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩ ]tm])

                 (tm_var
                    ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                      ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X))))))
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩ ]tm ~
     (π₂
        (tm_var
           ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩ ]tm

       [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩ ]tm
       ∧ (π₂
            (tm_var
               ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X)))
         [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩
         ]tm ~
         (π₁
            (π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)))))
         [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩, x₃ ⟩
         ]tm)
    ∧ (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))))
      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩ ]tm ~
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))))
      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩ ]tm
      ∧ (π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                         ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))))
        [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩ ]tm ~
        (π₂
           (tm_var
              ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
               ×h Z)))
        [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩ ]tm
        ∧ φ'
          [⟨ π₂
               (tm_var
                  ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                   ×h Z)),
           π₂
             (π₂
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)))) ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₂ ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩
           ]tm] ⊢ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f₁

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₁
  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) X
x₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
           ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) X
y:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Y
z₁:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Z))))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂
  (tm_var
     ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Z
f₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Z))))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
f₂:= π₂
  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
φ' [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f₁

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₁
  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm

     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) X

  (π₁
     (tm_var
        ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
           ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))): tm

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Y
z₁:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Z))))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂
  (tm_var
     ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)): tm

     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Z

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Z))))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
f₂:= π₂
  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= φ' [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]: form
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
φ' [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f₁

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)

  Y

∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]: form
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
z₁ ~ z₂ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂

              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Y
z₁:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Z))))))): tm

     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂
  (tm_var
     ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)): tm

     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Z
f₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Z))))))): tm

     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
f₂:= π₂
  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= φ' [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]: form
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
q₁: Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
(x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Z
f₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Z))))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
f₂:= π₂
  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= φ' [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]: form
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
q₁: Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) X
 exact x₃.
