     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= φ' [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]: form
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
q₁: Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
q₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
φ' [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f₁

              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= φ' [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]: form
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
q₁: Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
q₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))

  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var

                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm

     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= φ' [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]: form
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)

q₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
q₃: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
Δ ⊢ f₂ ~ f₁

∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)

q₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
q₃: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]

   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]: form
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
q₁: Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
q₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
q₃: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
Δ ⊢ φ' [⟨ ?x₁, ?y₁ ⟩]

     (π₁

Δ:= φ' [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]: form
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)

q₁: Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
q₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
q₃: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
tm

     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Z
 exact z₂.

q₁: Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
q₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
q₃: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
Δ ⊢ f₂ ~ f₂
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₁
  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) X
x₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
           ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) X
y:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Y
z₁:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Z))))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂
  (tm_var
     ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Z
f₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Z))))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
f₂:= π₂
  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= φ' [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]: form
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
q₁: Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
q₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
q₃: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]

  (π₂
     (π₁

∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]: form

q₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

  Y

  Y

  (π₁

                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)

     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))

  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var

∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]: form

q₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

 exact q₃.

∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

  Y

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm

     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) X

     (π₁

              (π₁

                    ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)

∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]

  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)

  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)

∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f₁

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁

                 ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm

     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) X

  (π₁

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Z))))))): tm

     ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)

  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= φ' [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]: form
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
q₁: Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
q₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
q₃: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
q₄: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f₂, f₁ ⟩]
q₅: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₁]
φ' [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f₁

  (π₁

                    ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Z))))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
f₂:= π₂
  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁

Δ:= φ' [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]: form
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)

q₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

q₄: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f₂, f₁ ⟩]

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

  Y

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁

                 ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)

     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= φ' [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]: form
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
q₁: Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
q₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
q₃: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
q₄: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f₂, f₁ ⟩]
tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
 exact f₂.

   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f₁

  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm

∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]: form
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)

q₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

q₄: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f₂, f₁ ⟩]
q₅: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₁]
⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂ ⊢ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Y
z₁:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Z))))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂
  (tm_var
     ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Z
f₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((Z ×h ℙ (...)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Z))))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
f₂:= π₂
  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= φ' [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]: form
  ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
q₁: Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
q₂: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
q₃: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
q₄: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f₂, f₁ ⟩]
q₅: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₁]
q₆: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂
q₇: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
φ' [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f₁

∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₂]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₂ ⟩]: form

     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)

q₅: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₁]

q₇: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
Δ ⊢ ?y ~ y

q₄: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f₂, f₁ ⟩]
q₅: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₁]
q₆: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₂
q₇: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

          exact q₂.

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₁
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
f:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
q₁: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ⊢ z ~ z
q₂: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
q₃: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f ⊢ x ~ x
φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
⊢ (exp_comm_partial_setoid φ') [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₁
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
f:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
q₁: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ⊢ z ~ z
q₂: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
q₃: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f ⊢ x ~ x
φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
⊢ (∃h (∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
       ∧ ∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2 φ')
         ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1))
  [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]

q₃: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f ⊢ x ~ x

⊢ ∃h ((∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
       ∧ ∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2 φ')
         ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_1)
      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩
         [π₁
            (tm_var

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) Z

q₂: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
q₃: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f ⊢ x ~ x

                  ×h Z))))) ~
   π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                  ×h Z)))))
   ∧ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))) ~
     π₂
       (tm_var
          ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))
     ∧ φ'
       [⟨ π₂
            (tm_var
               ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h Z)),
        π₂
          (π₂
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z)))) ⟩])
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩]

q₂: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
q₃: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f ⊢ x ~ x

⊢ (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                  ×h Z))))) ~
   π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                  ×h Z))))))
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩]
  ∧ (π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   ((((X ×h Z) ×h Y)
                     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h Z))))) ~
     π₂
       (tm_var

    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩]
    ∧ φ'
      [⟨ π₂
           (tm_var

               ×h Z)),
       π₂
         (π₂
            (π₁

                   ×h Z)))) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x, f ⟩ ⟩, z ⟩ ]tm]

q₂: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
q₃: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f ⊢ x ~ x

⊢ (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₁
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
f:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
q₁: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ⊢ z ~ z
q₂: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
q₃: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f ⊢ x ~ x
φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
⊢ x ~ x ∧ z ~ z ∧ φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩]

             apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
q₃: φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f ⊢ x ~ x
φ' [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
⊢ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩
      [π₁
         (tm_var
            ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
             ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
    π₂
      (tm_var
         ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
          ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y), ⟨ x, f ⟩
   ⟩]

ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
lam_partial_setoid ζ'
⊢ (lam_partial_setoid ζ')
  [tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
lam_partial_setoid ζ' ⊢ lam_partial_setoid ζ'

      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
(lam_partial_setoid ζ')
[π₁
   (tm_var
      ((Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)
       ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y))]
∧ φ'
  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)))
     [π₁
        (tm_var
           ((Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)
            ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)) ]tm,
   π₂
     (tm_var
        ((Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)
         ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)) ⟩]
⊢ φ'
  [π₁
     (tm_var
        ((Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)
         ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y))]
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
(lam_partial_setoid_form ζ')
[π₁ (tm_var ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
∧ φ'
  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
     ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ φ' [π₁ (tm_var ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]

ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
(lam_partial_setoid_form ζ')
[π₁ (tm_var ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
∧ φ'
  [⟨ π₁
       (π₁ (tm_var ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
z:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))): tm ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) Z

q₁: (lam_partial_setoid_form ζ') [⟨ z, f ⟩]
∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩] ⊢ z ~ z
g ~ g ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [g]

          exact (from_eq_in_exp_partial_setoid_function_left _ _ (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

  Y

  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

  Y

x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ X
y:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ Y

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
x:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
         ×h Y))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  X
y:= π₂
  (tm_var
     ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  Y
z:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  Z
f:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
g:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
            ×h Y)))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
(lam_partial_setoid_form ζ') [⟨ z, f ⟩]
∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩] ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

  Y

  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

  Y
p: φ = ζ'
x:= π₂

     (tm_var

         ×h Y))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  X
y:= π₂
  (tm_var
     ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  Y
z:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  Z
f:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var

                ×h X) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
g:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
            ×h Y)))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= (lam_partial_setoid_form ζ') [⟨ z, f ⟩]
∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]: form
  ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
(lam_partial_setoid_form ζ') [⟨ z, f ⟩]
∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩] ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

     (π₁
        (tm_var
           ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
            ×h Y)))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= (lam_partial_setoid_form ζ') [⟨ z, f ⟩]
∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]: form
  ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
q: Δ ⊢ (lam_partial_setoid_form ζ') [⟨ z, f ⟩]
(lam_partial_setoid_form ζ') [⟨ z, f ⟩]
∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩] ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid φ') [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g

φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
x:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
         ×h Y))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  X
y:= π₂
  (tm_var
     ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  Y
z:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  Z
f:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
g:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
            ×h Y)))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= (lam_partial_setoid_form ζ') [⟨ z, f ⟩]
∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]: form
  ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
q: Δ ⊢ (lam_partial_setoid_form ζ') [⟨ z, f ⟩]
((lam_partial_setoid_form (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ'))
 [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]) ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g
⊢ (exp_comm_partial_setoid φ') [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]

       ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y),
   ⟨ x, g ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2 φ'))
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩
        [π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))

        (tm_var

((lam_partial_setoid_form (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ'))
 [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]) ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g

   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩
      [π₁
         (tm_var
            (((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

  Y

  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

 ∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]) ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g: form ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)

((lam_partial_setoid_form (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ'))
 [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]) ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g
⊢ ((∃h exp_comm_partial_setoid_3)
   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩
      [π₁
         (tm_var
            (((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
              ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
    π₂
      (tm_var
         (((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
           ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var
       ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y),
   ⟨ x, g ⟩ ⟩]
  ∧ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2 φ'))
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩
        [π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
      π₂
        (tm_var
           (((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
             ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])
    [⟨ tm_var
         ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
          ×h Y), ⟨ x, g ⟩ ⟩]
    ∧ (exp_comm_partial_setoid_1
       [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩
          [π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                   ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
          ]tm,
        π₂
          (tm_var
             (((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
               ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])
      [⟨ tm_var
           ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
            ×h Y), ⟨ x, g ⟩ ⟩]

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

  Y
p: φ = ζ'
x:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
         ×h Y))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  X
y:= π₂
  (tm_var

  Y

  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
x:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
         ×h Y))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  X
y:= π₂
  (tm_var
     ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  Y
z:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  Z
f:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
g:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
            ×h Y)))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= (lam_partial_setoid_form ζ') [⟨ z, f ⟩]
∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]: form
  ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
q: Δ ⊢ (lam_partial_setoid_form ζ') [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ'':= ((lam_partial_setoid_form
    (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ')) [⟨ z, f ⟩]
 ∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]) ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g: form ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
q₁: Δ'' ⊢ z ~ z
q₂: Δ'' ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [g]
q₃: Δ'' ⊢ x ~ x
((lam_partial_setoid_form (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ'))
 [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]) ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g ⊢ z ~ z
 exact q₁.

    (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ')) [⟨ z, f ⟩]
 ∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]) ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g: form ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)

q₂: Δ'' ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [g]
q₃: Δ'' ⊢ x ~ x

 [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]) ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g
⊢ ((∃h (exp_comm_partial_setoid_2 φ'))
   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩

         (tm_var
            (((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
              ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,

      (tm_var
         (((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
           ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var
       ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y),
   ⟨ x, g ⟩ ⟩]

      [⟨ ⟨ tm_var

                  ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm,

              ×h Y) ×h Z)) ⟩])

φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)

     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
g:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
            ×h Y)))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= (lam_partial_setoid_form ζ') [⟨ z, f ⟩]
∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]: form
  ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
q: Δ ⊢ (lam_partial_setoid_form ζ') [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ'':= ((lam_partial_setoid_form
    (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ')) [⟨ z, f ⟩]
 ∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]) ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g: form ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
q₁: Δ'' ⊢ z ~ z
q₂: Δ'' ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [g]
q₃: Δ'' ⊢ x ~ x
((lam_partial_setoid_form (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ'))
 [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]) ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g
⊢ x ~ x ∧ z ~ z ∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]

     ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  Y

                ×h X) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))

  (ℙ (X ×h Y))

∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]: form
  ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)

    (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ')) [⟨ z, f ⟩]
 ∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]) ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g: form ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)

q₂: Δ'' ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [g]

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
            ×h Y)))): tm ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= (lam_partial_setoid_form ζ') [⟨ z, f ⟩]
∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]: form
  ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
q: Δ ⊢ (lam_partial_setoid_form ζ') [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ'':= ((lam_partial_setoid_form
    (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ')) [⟨ z, f ⟩]
 ∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]) ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g: form ((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
q₁: Δ'' ⊢ z ~ z
q₂: Δ'' ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [g]
q₃: Δ'' ⊢ x ~ x
((lam_partial_setoid_form (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ'))
 [⟨ z, f ⟩] ∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]) ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ g

                           (tm_var (((...) ×h X) ×h Z))))))))

                      ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))),

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

  Y

  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

  Y

  ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ X
((lam_partial_setoid_form (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ'))
 [⟨ π₁

                         (((... ×h ...) ×h X) ×h Z))))))))

                          ×h X) ×h Z))))))) ⟩])

     π₂

                (tm_var

    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₂

                    (tm_var

                      (tm_var
                         (((((... ×h X) ×h Y)
                            ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                          ×h Z))))),
         π₂
           (π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((((... ×h X) ×h Y)
                          ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                        ×h Z))))) ⟩ ⟩,
       π₂
         (tm_var
            (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
             ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((((...) ×h ℙ ...) ×h X) ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))),
  π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((((Z ×h ℙ ...) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                    ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                 ×h Z))))) ⟩
  ∈ π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((((... ×h ...) ×h X) ×h Y)
                           ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                         ×h Z)))))))

φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

  Y

  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

  Y
p: φ = ζ'
Γ:= ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H

 [⟨ π₁
      (π₁

        (π₁

    π₂

                          ×h X) ×h Z))))))) ⟩])

           (π₁

                           (tm_var (((...) ×h X) ×h Z))))))))
       ⟩,
     π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   ((((((... ×h ...) ×h X) ×h Y)
                      ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))
     ⟩,
   ⟨ π₁
       (π₂

             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   ((((((... ×h ...) ×h X) ×h Y)
                      ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))),
   π₂
     (π₂
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((((... ×h ...) ×h X) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))

  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3

               (π₁

                                ×h X) ×h Z)))))),

                            (π₁ (tm_var ((...) ×h Z))))))))
           ⟩,
         π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁

                    (tm_var

                        ×h Z))))) ⟩,

  ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ X

 [⟨ π₁

  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₂
           (π₁

                           ×h Z)))))),

                           (tm_var (((...) ×h X) ×h Z))))))))

                (tm_var

                      ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))),
   π₂

  ∧ exp_comm_partial_setoid_3
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₂
               (π₁

                                ×h X) ×h Z)))))),

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
Γ:= ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ X
x₂:= π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ X

y:= π₂
  (π₁

  (tm_var
     (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)

           [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩, y ⟩, ⟨ x₂, f₃ ⟩ ⟩, z₂ ⟩
           ]tm] ⊢ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f₂

    (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ')) [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
 ∧ φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩])
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]: form
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

 [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩] ∧ φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩])

   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

    (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ')) [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
 ∧ φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩])
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]: form
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ ?y

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

  Y

  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
Γ:= ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁

Δ:= ((lam_partial_setoid_form
    (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ')) [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
 ∧ φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩])
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]: form
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
(x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₃

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
Γ:= ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁

    (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ')) [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
 ∧ φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩])
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]: form
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂ ⊢ x₃ ~ x₂

q₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
((lam_partial_setoid_form (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ'))
 [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩] ∧ φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩])
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f₂

Δ:= ((lam_partial_setoid_form
    (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ')) [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
 ∧ φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩])
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]: form
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
q₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

Δ:= ((lam_partial_setoid_form
    (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ')) [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
 ∧ φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩])
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]: form
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
q₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
q₂: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
((lam_partial_setoid_form (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ'))
 [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩] ∧ φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩])
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f₂

   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]: form
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
q₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]

               apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

 ∧ φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩])

   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]: form
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
q₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
q₂: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂

 [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩] ∧ φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩])

  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)

⊢ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f₂

Δ:= ((lam_partial_setoid_form
    (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ')) [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
 ∧ φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩])
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]: form
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
q₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
q₂: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
q₃: Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
Δ ⊢ ?y₁ ~ f₃

    (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ')) [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
 ∧ φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩])
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]: form
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)

tm
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
     ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
 exact f₃.
                 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
Γ:= ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((((Z ×h ℙ (...))
                       ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₁
  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                    ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) X
x₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
             ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
         ×h Z))): tm
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) X
y:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                   ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Y
z₁:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((((... ×h ...) ×h X)
                           ×h Y)
                          ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                        ×h Z)))))))): tm
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂
  (tm_var
     (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
         ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)): tm
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z) Z
f₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((((... ×h ...) ×h X)
                           ×h Y)
                          ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                        ×h Z)))))))): tm
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
f₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((((((Z ×h ...) ×h ℙ (...))
                         ×h X) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Z))))))): tm
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
f₃:= π₂
  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                    ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= ((lam_partial_setoid_form
    (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ')) [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
 ∧ φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩])
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]: form
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
q₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
q₂: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
q₃: Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
Δ ⊢ z₂ ~ z₁

  (ℙ (X ×h Y))

   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]: form

      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)

q₂: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
q₃: Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
Δ ⊢ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]

  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                    ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm

   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)

    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]: form

      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)

q₃: Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩]

                 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]: form

               apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
             
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
Γ:= ((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
  ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z: ty H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((((Z ×h ℙ (...))
                       ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                    ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)))))): tm
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)

 ∧ φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩])
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]: form

q₅: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃

 [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩] ∧ φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩])

   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x₁, y ⟩ ∈ f₂

  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= ((lam_partial_setoid_form
    (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ')) [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
 ∧ φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩])
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]: form
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
q₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
q₂: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
q₃: Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
q₄: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f₃, f₂ ⟩]
q₅: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃
Δ ⊢ y ~ y

               exact (exp_partial_setoid_cod_defined _ _ q₂ q₅).

  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)

  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
f₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((((((Z ×h ...) ×h ℙ (...))
                         ×h X) ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                     ×h Z))))))): tm
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))

  (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                    ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)
                 ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z))))): tm
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
  (ℙ (X ×h Y))
Δ:= ((lam_partial_setoid_form
    (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ')) [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
 ∧ φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩])
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]: form
  (((((((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)
q₁: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
q₂: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
q₃: Δ ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
q₄: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ f₃, f₂ ⟩]
q₅: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃
q₆: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
Δ ⊢ y ~ y
 exact q₆.

    (partial_setoid_exp_comm φ')) [⟨ z₁, f₁ ⟩]
 ∧ φ' [⟨ z₁, f₂ ⟩])
∧ (exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f₃]
   ∧ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃)
  ∧ (x₁ ~ x₃ ∧ z₁ ~ z₁ ∧ x₃ ~ x₂)
    ∧ x₁ ~ x₁ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂ ∧ φ' [⟨ z₂, f₃ ⟩]: form

      ×h Y) ×h X ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Z)

q₅: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃
q₆: Δ ⊢ y ~ y
Δ ⊢ ⟨ x₂, y ⟩ ∈ f₃
 exact q₅.
      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
z:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))): tm ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) Z
f:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))): tm ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
g:= π₂ (tm_var ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))): tm ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
q₁: (lam_partial_setoid_form ζ') [⟨ z, f ⟩]
∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩] ⊢ z ~ z
(lam_partial_setoid_form ζ') [⟨ z, f ⟩]
∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩] ⊢ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
z:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))): tm ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) Z
f:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))): tm ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
g:= π₂ (tm_var ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))): tm ((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
q₁: (lam_partial_setoid_form ζ') [⟨ z, f ⟩]
∧ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩] ⊢ z ~ z
φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩] ⊢ φ' [⟨ z, g ⟩]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
φ' = lam_partial_setoid φ

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
φ' = lam_partial_setoid φ

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
φ' ⊢ lam_partial_setoid φ
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
lam_partial_setoid φ ⊢ φ'

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
φ' ⊢ lam_partial_setoid φ
 exact lam_partial_setoid_unique_left.
    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
ζ:= partial_setoid_exp_comm (lam_partial_setoid φ): partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
φ': partial_setoid_morphism Z
  (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
ζ':= partial_setoid_exp_comm φ': partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
p: φ = ζ'
lam_partial_setoid φ ⊢ φ'
 exact lam_partial_setoid_unique_right.
  Qed.
End LamEqs.
